_prism.purpose:
Pre-approves the tools prism's agents need so first runs in a fresh workspace don't hit the headless permission gate (acceptEdits mode only auto-approves Edit/Write, and there's no UI to answer interactive approval prompts).

- Bash(node:*) — base-resume + per-job draft agents shell out to node to build the DOCX.
- WebSearch — discovery scans HackerNews 'Who is hiring', YC job board, etc.; per-job research subagents check JD framing, company news.
- WebFetch — discovery fetches Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby JSON; per-job dispatcher fetches the posting URL; research subagents pull company pages.
_prism.safeToEdit: Yes — your own additions to permissions.allow stay if you re-seed (system-files.ts only writes this file when it's absent). To restrict WebFetch by domain, replace the bare "WebFetch" entry with e.g. "WebFetch(domain:greenhouse.io)", "WebFetch(domain:lever.co)", etc.
